title: standleya limae
intro: Standleya limae is a plant species belonging to the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the 'Lime Flower' due to its bright yellow and green coloration. The medicinal properties of Standleya limae include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and protecting against oxidative stress and infections. Standleya limae is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
